not-on-farm: You must be on your farm to use this, unless non-farm areas are enabled in the config.
main-player-only: Only the host can clean the farm in multiplayer.
already-cleaning: Farm Cleaner is still collecting drops from the last cleanup.
nothing-to-clear: Nothing to clear in this location.
config.hot-key.name: Hot Key
config.hot-key.tooltip: Key to clear selected trees, stones, grass, and debris from the current location.
config.enable-on-non-farm-areas.name: Enable On Non-Farm Areas
config.enable-on-non-farm-areas.tooltip: If enabled, the hot key and command can clear the current non-farm location. Use with care on custom maps.
config.gain-experience.name: Gain Experience
config.gain-experience.tooltip: If disabled, no experience is gained from clearing the farm.
config.clear-grass.name: Clear Grass
config.clear-grass.tooltip: If enabled, grass will also be cleared.
config.clear-fruit-trees.name: Clear Fruit Trees
config.clear-fruit-trees.tooltip: If enabled, fruit trees will also be cleared.
config.clear-tapped-trees.name: Clear Tapped Trees
config.clear-tapped-trees.tooltip: If enabled, trees with tappers will also be cleared.
config.clear-growing-trees.name: Clear Growing Trees
config.clear-growing-trees.tooltip: If enabled, trees that are not fully grown will also be cleared.
config.clear-giant-crops.name: Clear Giant Crops
config.clear-giant-crops.tooltip: If enabled, giant crops and meteorites will also be cleared.
config.drop-multiplier.name: Drop Multiplier
config.drop-multiplier.tooltip: Multiplies the number of dropped items (wood, stone, fiber, etc).
command.clearfarm.summary: Clears selected trees, stones, grass, and debris from the current location.
